responsibilities: Design and implement mathematical optimization models to solve complex scheduling, routing, and resource allocation problems
Develop efficient algorithms in Python and C++ to reduce solver runtime for large-scale combinatorial optimization problems
Formulate mixed-integer and nonlinear programming models to optimize business-critical operational and engineering processes
Benchmark and tune commercial solvers such as Gurobi and CPLEX to improve convergence speed and solution quality
Collaborate with software engineering teams to integrate optimization models into production-grade decision systems
Conduct sensitivity and scenario analysis to validate model robustness against real-world operational constraints
Research and prototype novel heuristic and metaheuristic algorithms to solve NP-hard optimization challenges
Document mathematical formulations and algorithmic approaches to support reproducibility and knowledge transfer
